task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Enterprise Sales Team' group with the correct description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A CRM settings or group management screen showing a new group named 'Enterprise Sales Team' and the description 'Team for handling large technology accounts'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Administrator' user is added to the 'Enterprise Sales Team' group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The group configuration or membership screen showing 'Administrator' in the list of selected members or users for the 'Enterprise Sales Team'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Leads list is filtered to show only leads in the 'Technology' industry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Leads module list view showing an active filter, search parameter, or column sorting that isolates leads where the Industry is 'Technology'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Technology' leads are selected for modification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes ticked next to the leads in the filtered list view. There should be exactly 5 leads visible and selected.

task_completion.description: Verify that the selected leads are reassigned to the 'Enterprise Sales Team' group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Mass Edit', 'Change Owner', or assignment dialog showing the 'Assigned To' (or equivalent ownership) field being set to the 'Enterprise Sales Team' group, followed by a confirmation or updated list view showing the new owner.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show a web browser interacting with the CRM interface, not a terminal window executing SQL commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that leads from other industries were not selected or modified.
integrity.visual_evidence: In the list of selected leads for reassignment, only leads with the 'Technology' industry should be visible. No leads with other industries should have their checkboxes ticked.

integrity.description: Verify genuine interaction with the CRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface must be the actual CRM application with proper styling, menus, and interactive elements, not a text editor or static HTML mock-up.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected group name is 'Enterprise Sales Team'. The target industry for lead reassignment is 'Technology'. There are exactly 5 leads in the 'Technology' industry that should be reassigned.
